mapper.select: /* MenuMapper.getMenu */ SELECT A.MENU_ID AS menuId ,A.MENU_PID AS menuPid ,A.MENU_NM AS menuNm ,A.MENU_ORDR AS menuOrdr ,A.MENU_TYPE AS menuType ,A.MENU_DEPTH AS menuDepth ,A.MENU_URL AS menuUrl ,A.MENU_ICON AS menuIcon ,A.USE_YN AS useYn ,A.SITE_CODE AS siteCode FROM TB_MENU A LEFT JOIN TB_MENU_AUTH B ON A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.MENU_PID = B.MENU_PID AND A.SITE_CODE = B.SITE_CODE WHERE A.MENU_DEPTH != '0' AND A.SITE_CODE = #{siteCode} AND B.AUTH_GRP_CD = #{authGrpCd} ORDER BY A.MENU_ORDR ASC
